race.comment: The 2000m Roses at Doomben is the key form reference. SOVERATO (6) settled next to last in that race two weeks ago then wound up strongly to finish sixth. That was her first outing since a respectable effort in the Australian Oaks in Sydney. Respect Waller's decision to keep her in training for a tilt at this. Hard to beat out to the classic distance. Stablemate PANOVA (1) is the interesting runner. Has not raced since impressively taking out the 2000m Australasian Oaks in Adelaide six weeks ago. Had a tick-over trial on 25 May. Must be respected. GRAND OMAHA (7) is yet to miss the frame in five runs this prep, adding to the tally last time out when she made late ground to finish third in the Roses. Only has to run the trip to be a key contender. FIREBALL MISS (3) won the Roses with a bit in hand and was strong late. A sprinter/miler on breeding but she seems up for this. SOLID GOLD (10) started favourite in the Derby last Saturday but didn't measure up. Can bounce back.
